{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Ball
|class_id=20242
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This golden elastic ball smells strange and fragrant like a living thing. It's, in fact, the essence of hundreds of super dung beetles' remains. However, its composition and function remain a mystery...
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=31
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -1%
|ss2=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -2%
|ss3=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss4=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss7=Against Dung Beetles, Troop Casualty -3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
